text.title: Living Documentation Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Living Documentation application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Docs MUST live in the source repo; external wiki rejected as primary store.
rule.rationale: External wikis drift from code within weeks.

rule.statement: Every auto-generated section MUST be wrapped in AUTO-GENERATED markers.
rule.rationale: Un-marked sections get manually edited and lose sync.

rule.statement: CI MUST validate doc links on every PR.
rule.rationale: Stale links erode trust faster than stale content.

rule.statement: ADR and design rationale MUST remain hand-authored; auto-generation rejected.
CHANGELOG MUST be generated from commit messages; manual edits rejected.
rule.rationale: Manual changelogs drift from actual history.
